overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a neon-lit futuristic city at night. The scene features towering buildings with holographic advertisements, bustling pedestrians, and light vehicle traffic in a dense urban downtown environment with cyberpunk aesthetics.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner with large political billboard

events.description: character begins walking along sidewalk following a pedestrian with pink hair
entering covered area beneath elevated transit overpass

agents.ego_description: following a pedestrian with pink hair along the city sidewalk, approaching the overpass

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with pink hair and white jacket walking ahead of ego
dark sedan driving past on the street to the left

entered.detail: tall digital billboard displaying '2nd AMENDMENT IS NOT ONLY FOR THE RICH' with figures in green uniforms
elevated highway or monorail track structure spanning across the street overhead
vertical pole with traffic signals and pedestrian crossing lights

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a neon-lit street corner dominated by a large political billboard. The camera follows a pedestrian with pink hair along the sidewalk, moving toward an elevated transit overpass that gradually looms overhead. Sparse vehicle traffic passes on the left while other pedestrians walk along the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk under elevated transit structure

events.description: moving under the overpass causes shift from open neon lighting to more shadowed artificial light
vehicle passes by on the left side of the street

agents.ego_description: continuing straight under the overpass structure, passing other pedestrians walking in opposite direction

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow shirt with text walking toward the camera
dark colored sedan driving along the street under the overpass

entered.detail: commercial building with large green neon 'softsys' signage illuminated on the facade
vertical digital billboard with 'GIRRUS SPORT' text in blue and red colors
standard regulatory traffic sign indicating speed limit of 40

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath the massive concrete overpass, the environment becomes more enclosed and sheltered. The green neon 'softsys' sign dominates the left side while various digital advertisements line the right. The lighting shifts to a mix of neon and shadow as vehicles pass on the street below the transit structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: large urban intersection with pedestrian crosswalks

events.description: exiting the covered overpass area into the open intersection plaza
crossing the wide street at the yellow striped crosswalk with other pedestrians

agents.ego_description: navigating across the wide intersection, moving around other pedestrians and observing traffic

notable_agents.action: black car waiting at the intersection for pedestrians to cross
group of pedestrians crossing the street in the same direction

entered.detail: multi-story commercial building with prominent 'EL PADRE' signage and warm yellow lighting
large bright digital billboard displaying 'EL FUEGO' advertisement
wide pedestrian crossing with bold yellow striped lines painted on asphalt

segments.scene_description: Emerging from under the overpass, the scene opens into a wide urban intersection filled with neon advertisements. The camera crosses the yellow-striped crosswalk, passing the illuminated 'EL PADRE' building on the right. Moderate pedestrian traffic moves through the intersection while vehicles wait at the crossing.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with holographic advertisements and transit pillars

events.description: turning slightly to follow the street curve while passing a large concrete support pillar
passing by parked vehicles and entering denser commercial signage area

agents.ego_description: walking down the new street section, passing a pedestrian in yellow and observing the towering digital billboards

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in bright yellow outfit walking ahead on the sidewalk
dark van parked along the curb on the right side

entered.detail: massive cylindrical structural support column for the overhead transit system
large vertical digital screen displaying 'NEXT DREAM' with colorful graphics
dark colored commercial van parked on the street edge

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the intersection, the camera proceeds down a commercial street lined with massive digital billboards including one for 'NEXT DREAM.' A large concrete support pillar dominates the left side of the walkway. The environment features dense cyberpunk architecture with neon signage covering the building facades as the character continues walking forward.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit urban corridor that shifts from an open street corner into a sheltered underpass before expanding into a bustling commercial intersection. It begins by following a pink-haired pedestrian past a large political billboard and toward a looming elevated transit overpass. As the camera moves beneath the massive concrete structure, the environment becomes more enclosed and shadowed, dominated by a green softsys sign and various digital advertisements. The scene then opens up as the camera emerges from the overpass to cross a yellow-striped intersection, passing the illuminated EL PADRE building amidst moderate pedestrian and vehicle traffic. Finally, the path leads down a dense commercial street lined with massive digital billboards, including one for NEXT DREAM, as the camera passes a large concrete support pillar surrounded by towering cyberpunk architecture.
